Yan Zhi ťĖĽŤäĚ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Zhi (ťĖĽŤäĚ). Reinforced Liu Bei after Yiling, died at Hanzhong when at service with Zhuge Liang. Yan Zhi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Yan Zhi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
